description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3.3.3-jdk-8-onbuild Docker image. Add a job named build (running in the default stage) that runs the shell commands 'mvn clean package -B' followed by 'cp target/XWeb.jar XWeb.jar' and publishes the resulting XWeb.jar as an artifact. The pipeline has no additional services, caches, variables, or conditional rules.
